evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Uburyo bwo gushakisha no gutunganya ibidukikije bwatewe n'uburyo bwo guhitamo ibidukikije mu gukemura ibibazo by'ubuhanga buhanitse.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: We are building composable workflow frameworks for release orchestration, quality gates, and post-deploy verification to reduce manual friction while improving reliability.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Our architecture experiments focus on service decomposition strategies, cross-region resiliency patterns, and performance envelopes for systems operating under volatile demand.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: We are validating event-streaming and edge inference designs that enable faster local decisions while keeping centralized control, auditability, and model lifecycle governance.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Ibipimo bya laboratwari byemejwe hamwe n'imizigo yigana hanyuma bigashyirwa mu ngamba za platform autoscaling.

operationalIntelligence.description: Imiyoboro ya NLP iva mu bushakashatsi bugenzurwa ijya ku bikorwa by'ubufasha bw'umusaruro kugira ngo hakorwe igenzura ryihuse no gusobanukirwa neza.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Evolutionary methods tested in the lab are translated into optimization engines for scheduling and allocation.

longHorizon.description: Guhuza igerageza, kugenzura, no kunoza kugirango sisitemu ishobore guhuza neza mugihe ibintu bihinduka.

aiReliability.summary: A practical perspective on balancing experimentation velocity with production governance.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Field notes from architecture trials focused on performance, resiliency, and operational simplicity.

roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: How we structure innovation initiatives so discoveries move from prototype to measurable value.

hero.description: A practical overview of how Horizon designs, deploys, and operates machine learning systems from prototype to production.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Machine Learning Pipelines
machineLearningPipelines.description: Production AI itangirana n'imiyoboro isubiramo ihuza amakuru, kugerageza, kwemeza no gutanga ibisubizo.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Model Deployment Patterns
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Uburyo bwo gukwirakwiza butoranyijwe hashingiwe ku bisabwa bya latency, uburemere bwubucuruzi, hamwe nubugome bw'imikorere.

mlopsOperatingModel.description: Imikorere ya MLOps yemeza ko sisitemu ya AI ikomeza kwizerwa, igenzurwa, kandi ikwirakwizwa uko ikoreshwa rikura.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kugenzura no kwizerwa
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability closes the loop between model behavior and operational results.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data and Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned data ingestion, quality checks, and reusable feature definitions create a reliable foundation for model training.

modelDevelopment.title: Iterambere ry'icyitegererezo
modelDevelopment.description: Experiments are tracked with reproducible configurations, objective metrics, and automated comparison baselines.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Amarembo yo kwemeza n'umutekano
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Ibipimo by'abakandida bibanza kugenzura imikorere, ubushobozi, n'igenzura rya politiki mbere yo kwemezwa gusohoka.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Post-deployment telemetry informs retraining priorities, rollback decisions, and next iteration planning.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Low-latency APIs for interactive applications with autoscaling, caching, and request-level observability.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch and Streaming Predictions
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Scheduled and event-driven pipelines for high-volume scoring across analytics and operational workflows.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge serving patterns for environments require local inference and centralized model governance.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD for Models
ciCdForModels.description: Kubaka, kugerageza, no kurekura ibikorwa bigabanya ibyago byo gukwirakwiza mugihe birinda umuvuduko wo gutanga ibicuruzwa.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry and Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned model artifacts with promotion stages, lineage, and approval workflows improve control and traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Gukorera ibikorwa remezo
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable serving layers with rollout strategies such as canary and shadow deployments support safe change management.

monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Data quality regression alerts and remediation workflows

cta.title: Scale Applied AI with Confidence
cta.description: Niba uteganya ibikorwa bya AI bikeneye ibisubizo bipimwa no kubungabunga igihe kirekire, Horizon irashobora gufasha gushushanya no gushyira mu bikorwa ubuzima bwose bwa sisitemu.

hero.title: NLP y'indimi nyinshi
hero.description: Explore practical natural language processing capabilities and how they scale into reliable, multilingual production systems.

foundations.title: Fondasiyo za NLP
foundations.description: Natural language processing combines linguistic signals and machine learning to extract meaning, intent, and structure from text.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Use the demo to test language detection, sentiment scoring, entity extraction, and translation behaviors in real time.

productionApplications.title: How Horizon Applies NLP in Production
productionApplications.description: Ubushobozi bwa NLP buhujwe mubikorwa byubucuruzi hamwe nuburyo bwo kurinda imikorere hamwe nibipimo byubuziranenge bisobanutse.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Amahame yo kwizerwa n'imiyoborere
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Production NLP requires more than model quality; Biterwa n'uburyo bwo gukwirakwiza no kugenzura buri gihe.

foundations.intro1: Modern NLP systems power support automation, search relevance, knowledge extraction, and multilingual collaboration. Effective implementation requires both model quality and strong operational controls.
foundations.intro2: At Horizon, we focus on end-to-end NLP systems that combine robust inference with observability, governance, and measurable production impact.

languageDetection.title: Gutahura ururimi
languageDetection.description: Identify language from short or long text segments to route requests into the right processing pipeline.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Extracts emotional intention and polarity for customer intelligence, support triage, and product feedback loops.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Detects structured entities such as names, companies, locations, and dates from unstructured text.

translation.title: Traduction
translation.description: Gufasha mu bikorwa by'indimi nyinshi binyuze mu gusemura inyandiko zakozwe n'umukoresha cyangwa zikora mugihe ugumana context.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Support and Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classify incoming requests by urgency, intent, and sentiment to accelerate up routing and response quality.

governedContentOperations.title: Ibikorwa bigenzurwa n'ibikubiyemo
governedContentOperations.description: Apply policy-aware language filters and moderation checks with measurable precision and recall targets.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Text-Driven Business Insights
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Aggregate trends from documents, reviews, and communications to inform strategy and operational decisions.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Evaluation by Use Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Models are benchmarked against domain-specific datasets before release decisions are made.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Human-in-the-Loop Protections
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Ibipimo by'ingenzi birimo inzira zo gusuzuma, amategeko yo kuzamuka, n'ibimenyetso by'icyizere.

continuousMonitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, and quality degradation are tracked continuously so retraining and rollback are proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Explore evolutionary computation in an interactive environment and see how the same principles translate into production optimization systems.

scientificFoundation.title: Fondasiyo ya Siyansi
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms ni uburyo bwo gutunganya bushingiye ku baturage bushingiye ku guhitamo kamere no guhindura.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Run the simulation to see fitness improve generation by generation and observe how selection pressure influences results.

productionUse.title: How Horizon Uses This in Production
productionUse.description: The same search mechanics used in this demo inform optimization pipelines deployed in operational systems.

applicationDomains.title: Wider Application Domains
applicationDomains.description: Evolutionary optimization is especially valuable in systems with dynamic goals and conflicting constraints.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Aho gushakisha igisubizo kimwe icyarimwe, algorithms za genetiki zihindura ubwoko butandukanye bw'abakandida. Buri gisekuru gisuzumwa hagendewe ku mikorere y'umubiri kandi gitunganyijwe binyuze mu guhitamo, crossover, no kwihindura.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Ibi bituma zikora neza ku bibazo bihanitse hamwe n'imbogamizi zitari umurongo, aho uburyo bwa deterministic buba bubi cyangwa buhenze cyane.

selection.title: Guhitamo
selection.description: Abayobozi b'inzego z'ibanze bafite amahirwe menshi yo kubaho no kugira uruhare mu iterambere ry'igihugu cyacu.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: Strong traits are recombined to create new candidate solutions with mixed strengths.

mutation.title: Mutation
mutation.description: Controlled randomness introduces diversity so search does not stall around local optima.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Uko imyaka igenda ihita indi igataha, abaturage bakomeje gushakisha ibisubizo bihamye kandi bihamye.

resourceScheduling.title: Gahunda y'ibikoresho
resourceScheduling.description: We use evolutionary strategies to optimize multi-constraint scheduling where brute-force search is inpossible.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Ibicuruzwa byikora ibicuruzwa bigenzurwa mu buryo bwihuse kugira ngo byongere imikorere n'ibiciro.

continuousOptimization.title: Continuous Optimization
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization jobs run in controlled loops with telemetry feedback so systems adapt as demand profiles shift.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Complex delivery and dispatch planning benefits from evolutionary search when constraints change rapidly.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model and Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Genetic search can discover high-quality model configurations when objective surfaces are noisy and non-linear.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio and Allocation Problems
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization under competitive goals can be framed as fitness tradeoffs across evolving candidate sets.
